svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="luban平台调用关系" id="luban-call"> <mxGraphModel dx="-524" dy="-186" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1000" pageHeight="720" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="G_CLIENT" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="客户端层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="620" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="N_ADMIN" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="管理后台
luban" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="200" x="60" y="74" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="N_WEB" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="对外站点
luban-website" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="200" x="280" y="74" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="G_EDGE" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="边缘与接入层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="620" x="40" y="164" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="N_CDN" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="CDN
静态 + 可选页面缓存" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="200" x="60" y="198" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="N_BFF" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="luban-bff
认证 / 聚合 / 协议适配" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="200" x="280" y="198" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="G_BACKEND" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="后端层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="620" x="40" y="288" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="N_API" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="luban-backend
或 luban-backend-go" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="240" x="200" y="322" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="G_DATA" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="数据层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="620" x="40" y="412" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="N_REDIS" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=10;" value="Redis
设置缓存 / 会话可选" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="180" x="120" y="446" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="N_MYSQL" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=10;" value="MySQL
业务真相源" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="180" x="380" y="446" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="G_ASSETS" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f0fdfa;strokeColor=#5eead4;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#134e4a;spacingTop=6;" value="前端资产" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="270" x="690" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="N_UI" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="luban-ui
Render / Designer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="210" x="720" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_ADMIN_BFF" edge="1" parent="1" source="N_ADMIN" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.3;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="N_BFF" value="/api/* 鉴权"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_WEB_BFF" edge="1" parent="1" source="N_WEB" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.7;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="N_BFF" value="/api/public/* 免鉴权"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_BFF_API" edge="1" parent="1" source="N_BFF" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="N_API" value="/backend/*
X-User-ID, X-User-Role"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_API_REDIS" edge="1" parent="1" source="N_API" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=0.35;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="N_REDIS"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_API_MYSQL" edge="1" parent="1" source="N_API" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=0.65;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="N_MYSQL"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_CDN_WEB" edge="1" parent="1" source="N_CDN" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="N_WEB" value="静态资源 / 已发布页缓存"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_UI_ADMIN" edge="1" parent="1" source="N_UI" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="N_ADMIN" value="被集成"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="700" y="110" /> <mxPoint x="700" y="100" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_UI_WEB" edge="1" parent="1" source="N_UI" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;exitX=0;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="N_WEB" value="被集成"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="720" y="160" /> <mxPoint x="520" y="160" /> <mxPoint x="520" y="126" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="LEGEND" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;align=left;spacingLeft=8;verticalAlign=middle;" value="图例：白底蓝边 = 应用节点；蓝填充 = 边缘接入核心；青绿色 = 前端资产（被集成）。实线 = 运行时调用，虚线 = 构建/集成关系。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="920" x="40" y="540" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div: 图例：白底蓝边 = 应用节点；蓝填充 = 边缘接入核心；青绿色 = 前端资产（被集成）。实线 = 运行时调用，虚线 = 构建/集成关系。

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
